reviews.comment:
Llevé el auto para revisiones pre VTV y resultó ser muy bueno. Ahora para una mirada en general, dijeron 48hs, pasó la semana completa y sin noticias. Llamé muchísimas veces y no atienden. Me comuniqué por watsapp y respondieron, días después no lo hicieron.

(Translated by Google)
I took the car for pre-VTV inspections and it turned out to be very good. Now for a general overview, they said 48 hours, but a whole week went by with no news. I called countless times, but they didn't answer. I contacted them via WhatsApp and they answered, but days later they didn't.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoOXVLUVpREAE

reviews.comment:
Había que llevar a la artífice del "EFECTO DOMINO" 1937..PERO TENIAN UNA RÉPLICA..CON DESTINO SIMILAR A LAS 9 REINAS..ERAN ESTARUILLAS DUPLICADAS..QUE NO PUDIERON DEMOSTRAR LA AUTENTICIDAD..QUE AUTITO !!

(Translated by Google)
They had to bring the creator of the "Domino Effect" of 1937... BUT THEY HAD A REPLICA... WITH A SIMILAR DESTINATION TO THE 9 QUEENS... THEY WERE DUPLICATED STATUES... WHOSE AUTHENTICITY COULD NOT BE PROVEN... WHAT A CAR!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobElLRXR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Malísima la atención del playero, pregunte para pagar con QR y me contestó de mala manera "pague como quiera y si no lo toma arreglese con su banco" tampoco quiso sumarme los puntos Ypf, luego lo hizo de mal modo. Pésimo.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendant was terrible. I asked about paying with a QR code and he rudely replied, "Pay however you want, and if it doesn't work, sort it out with your bank." He also refused to add my YPF points, and then finally did it rudely. Awful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoLVBXWXZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No funciona la Ap. Los empleados le piden permiso a una mano para mover la otra. Comparada con otras estaciones ACA. La peor

(Translated by Google)
The AP doesn't work. Employees have to ask permission from one hand to move the other. Compared to other ACA stations, this is the worst.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMk1fd19BRRAB
